_meta.title: Metal Mineral Occurrences (Mineral Logam) — Ni, Fe
_meta.source: ESDM / Badan Geologi — Keterdapatan Mineral Logam (peta 50K)
_meta.disclaimer: Prototype data. Occurrence points (keterdapatan), not concession/IUP boundaries. Resource figures (ore_t / metal_t in tonnes) are the largest reported category per point and are indicative only. Verify against ESDM MODI / Minerba One Map before real use.
